checkpoint_visible.evidence: gemma-3-12b and declared frozen variants absent from visible local and /mnt/cluster paths

tokenizer_visible.evidence: no tokenizer files or tokenizer hash receipt

token_ids_verified.evidence: IDs cannot be checked without exact tokenizer revision and encode/decode receipt

logits_verified.evidence: no reference forward-pass artifact, runtime hash, full candidate vector, or reproducible logsumexp receipt

log_probabilities_verified.evidence: sampled-path values are asserted without a bound reference forward pass

ftpo_decision_pairs.evidence: each FTPO example requires one prefix-bound rejected continuation token and 2-8 coherent chosen tokens at the same next-token decision; none are supplied

muse_entropy.evidence: one sampled token log-probability per time step does not define the decision-space distribution or entropy

protected_facts.evidence: no protected-fact hashes or preservation result

independent_review.evidence: no approved reviewer receipt or generator-family exclusion

dataset_manifest.evidence: no S1 sidecar manifest, generator version, schema hash, permitted uses, or record count

split_and_leakage.evidence: no train/validation/holdout artifacts, split receipt, or ancestry/near-duplicate audit

execution_runtime.evidence: nvidia-smi, sbatch, squeue, and secret-manager-cli unavailable

method_correction.submitted_claim: apply MSE directly to rejected raw logits
method_correction.finding: not the frozen FTPO baseline contract
method_correction.required: use the preregistered FTPO preference-margin objective over chosen versus rejected logits plus reference regularization; compare against the separately frozen final-token DPO arm

minimum_valid_s1_bundle: S1 JSONL conforming to ftpo-training-example-1.0.0 for every example
Exact Gemma checkpoint, tokenizer, runtime, and code hashes
Reference forward-pass receipt proving token IDs, token text, logits, and log-probabilities
Two to eight coherent chosen alternatives at every rejected next-token decision
Protected-fact, CDA, semantic-necessity, independent-review, and generator-exclusion receipts
SYNTHETIC_NONEMPIRICAL sidecar manifest and deterministic generation receipt
Connected-component splits plus ancestry and near-duplicate leakage audit
Visible training runtime, rollback checkpoint, nonzero bounded budget, and atomic execution-transition receipt
